name: Meta Ads
description: Manage Meta (Facebook/Instagram) ad campaigns, experiments, and marketing knowledge base

tools.name: get_campaigns
tools.description: List all campaigns in the ad account

tools.name: get_campaign_insights
tools.description: Get performance metrics for a campaign over a date range

tools.name: get_ad_insights
tools.description: Get performance metrics for a specific ad

tools.name: get_account_summary
tools.description: Get a summary of the entire ad account performance

tools.name: get_ad_sets
tools.description: List ad sets in a campaign

tools.name: get_ads
tools.description: List ads in an ad set

tools.name: get_ad_set_insights
tools.description: Get performance metrics for an ad set over a date range

tools.name: create_campaign
tools.description: Create a new campaign (defaults to PAUSED)

tools.name: create_ad_set
tools.description: Create a new ad set within a campaign

tools.name: create_ad
tools.description: Create a new ad in an ad set

tools.name: pause_resume_campaign
tools.description: Pause or resume a campaign

tools.name: pause_resume_ad_set
tools.description: Pause or resume an ad set

tools.name: create_ad_creative
tools.description: Create an ad creative for use with create_ad

tools.name: update_budget
tools.description: Update daily or lifetime budget for a campaign or ad set

tools.name: update_targeting
tools.description: Update targeting for an ad set

tools.name: create_experiment
tools.description: Create a new A/B test experiment with hypothesis and variants

tools.name: update_experiment_metrics
tools.description: Update performance metrics for a variant in an experiment

tools.name: conclude_experiment
tools.description: Mark an experiment as concluded with a winner and learnings

tools.name: get_experiment
tools.description: Read a single experiment by name

tools.name: list_experiments
tools.description: List all experiments with their status

tools.name: check_significance
tools.description: Run A/B significance test between two variants

tools.name: add_learning
tools.description: Add an entry to the marketing knowledge base

tools.name: get_knowledge_base
tools.description: Read the full marketing knowledge base
